name: bigvgan_disc_fm_retest
description: Retest discriminator feature matching after bfloat16 dtype fix. Uses optimal config from overnight sweep (snake_alpha, GAFilter, lr=1e-4, phase=1.0, L2-SP=1e-3, 5000 steps).

experiments.description: Control: best config from overnight sweep without discriminator. Baseline for A/B comparison.
Discriminator feature matching at 5k steps. Tests if perceptual FM loss improves over mel+phase alone.
